response.overview: In this Special Edition, Agent Hermocrate lunges into a frantic race atop the Empire State Building, tasked with exfiltrating Sarkozy on Gaddafi’s orders. But the plan spirals into chaos when his leader, The Apotropaic Phallus perishes in the accidental explosion of his own gadget. Faced with this absurd carnage, Hermocrate doesn’t plummet from the skyscraper; instead, he undergoes a brutal mental collapse. Lost in this geopolitical delirium, his mind lets go and sinks into total confusion.
response.title: Mission Sarkozy
